# Case move-between-runtime: Step 4

## Changed Files
- moduleA.js
- moduleAs.js
- moduleB.js
- moduleBs.js

## Asset Files
- Bundle: chunkS_js.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Bundle: chunk_js.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Bundle: main.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Bundle: shared.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Bundle: workerA_js.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Bundle: workerB_js.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Manifest: [runtime of workerA_js].LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 71
- Manifest: [runtime of workerB_js].LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 71
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 56
- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 175
- Update: shared.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 896
- Update: workerA_js.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 667
- Update: workerB_js.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 537

## Manifest

### [runtime of workerA_js].LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["shared","workerA_js"],"r":[],"m":["./module.js","./moduleS.js"]}
```



### [runtime of workerB_js].LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["shared","workerB_js"],"r":[],"m":["./module.js","./moduleS.js"]}
```



### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main"],"r":[],"m":["./module.js","./moduleS.js"]}
```


## Update


### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules


#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {},function(__rspack_require) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__rspack_require.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```



### shared.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./moduleAs.js
- ./moduleBs.js

#### Changed Runtime Modules


#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("shared", {
"./moduleAs.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)
});
/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (4);
if (Math.random() < 0) __rspack_require.e(/* import() */ "chunkS_js").then(__rspack_require.bind(__rspack_require, "./chunkS.js"));


},
"./moduleBs.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)
});
/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (4);


},

});
```



### workerA_js.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./moduleA.js

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("workerA_js", {
"./moduleA.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)
});
/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (4);
if (Math.random() < 0) __rspack_require.e(/* import() */ "chunk_js").then(__rspack_require.bind(__rspack_require, "./chunk.js"));


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__rspack_require.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```



### workerB_js.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./moduleB.js

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("workerB_js", {
"./moduleB.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)
});
/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (4);


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__rspack_require.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```




## Runtime
### Status

```txt
check => prepare => dispose => apply => idle
```

#### Outdated

Outdated Modules:

```json
{}
```

#### Updated

- `__rspack_require.h`
